## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Risk

Explain effects on sample alignment, stream state, concurrency, compatibility,
security, privacy, GPU execution, or packaging. Write "none" only when those
areas were considered and are unaffected.

## Verification

List the exact commands and results. Attach generated evidence for performance
claims; do not include audio or secrets.

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make test-integration`
- [ ] Relevant GPU/container checks were run or explicitly identified as unavailable.
- [ ] Tests and documentation were updated.
- [ ] The contribution is mine to license under MIT and contains no unauthorized material.
